subcodes.first_line: Exalted be the All-Merciful Who revealed the Torah and the Gospel and the Qur'án, then the Bayán, and hath manifested the Mother Book when God was established upon the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی الرحمن الذی انزل التوریه و الانجیل و الفرقان ثم البیان و اظهر ام الکتاب اذ استوی الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
